company.what_they_do: punkproof.com is a public/shared email service provider — it offers free email accounts (e.g. user@punkproof.com) to the general public. It is not a product or SaaS company; it is an email hosting/webmail service positioning itself as a legitimate (non-throwaway) free email domain.
company.raw_notes: The homepage text explicitly describes punkproof.com as a 'public email service' focused on spam prevention and safety. It asks website operators not to block its domain, clarifying it is 'not a throwaway email service' and that 'emails will not bounce.' It prohibits illegal activities and states it does not allow sending messages to the internet. It provides an abuse reporting ticket system. There is no mention of a product, SaaS platform, team, founders, pricing, or any B2B offering. The org_name 'Alicesec' was typed by the user at signup but does not appear anywhere on the punkproof.com site — it is not a company associated with this domain.
